Staff of Elemental Mastery: Fire  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Reclaim Energy (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
Focus: Servant of Fire
WT: 5.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Staff of Elemental Mastery: Fire
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Reclaim Energy (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
Focus: Servant of Fire
WT: 5.0 Size: LARGE
Class: MAG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Light:Flameless Lantern
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:24:10
Page Updated:Wed Apr 26th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 46
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Hate
NPC Name
a forsaken revenant - male
Magi P`Tasa
Mistress of Scorn


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Hate


Uploaded March 19th, 2022 by halfridge
Updated March 20th, 2022

Post Comment
Dropped today
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2024 at 6:31 PM Rating: Decent
MightilyOats
Scholar
66 posts
Off the 'a forsaken revenant' (male)
▲ Page top
Staff found on male revenant colocated w/Magi P'Tasa
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2014 at 2:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1634516435061
Scholar
51 posts
Farming for the Ranger emerald for four days now, about 30+ hours, no drop, but....found an interesting pattern on this staff.
The staff drops off a male revenant that seems to regularly pop (maybe 3 out of 4, or five times) directly East of the PH for the MAGI. I have killed him multiple times now and today alone he has dropped the staff four times. my bet is, keep the magi and this revenant PH clear and you will get the staff of elemental mastery; fire.
▲ Page top
Gives off light when on MOB
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2010 at 7:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591888103991
Scholar
241 posts
Found out today, does not show in hands when mob has it, but does give off light so you can see the light if the mob has it. (At least you can see the light in The Plane Of Hate.

Dadijob (Prexus) TA Rocks
▲ Page top
both staff of earth and fire

# Oct 09 2004 at 5:25 PM Rating: Decent

Scholar
308 posts
I can confirm that this drops on forsaken revenants, and that it DOES have the ability Focus: Servant of Fire (enhances pets from 49-60).

Thanks
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2004 at 3:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758640514
53 posts
My newb magi was given this the other day while I was medded just after getting the skil (lev 4). Didn't know what it was at the time so probably wasn't enthusiastic enought with the thanks. If whoever gave me this the other day reads this:- Thank you, thank you, thank you. /Getme worships the ground you walk on.

Getme now lev 7 Magi

Sorry refers to crown

▲ Page top
Do these even work now?
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2002 at 10:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756654380
140 posts
Question I have is if these even do anything now that they patched and said that summoned pets are always the highest lvl now instead of a range. Has anyone parsed HP or Damage output since the patch to see if these even effect your pets now?
▲ Page top
RE: Do these even work now?
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2003 at 6:26 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249716241
Sage
207 posts
Not parsed, no, but I do notice a difference. with the water staff, my 54 pet cast at lvl 55 does 58 damage per hit as opposed to 56, and backstabs for 172 vs 168. not a big difference, but every bit helps.

Faelawen Starfyre, the Mad Mage of Povar
▲ Page top
search
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2002 at 12:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246402577
118 posts
it searches for blocks of words as if u had typed "staff fire"
as far as i know the only way to get around this is to type a block that is intact aka [Elemental Mastery]
▲ Page top
premium searching
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2002 at 3:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764342587
16 posts
When I did a search for: Staff Fire
I got no results. However when I searched for just: Fire
I got: Staff of Elemental Mastery: Fire
Why didnt it come up on the first search, and can you fix this?
▲ Page top
RE: premium searching
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2004 at 2:49 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Because the name does not have the sequence of characters "staff fire", anywhere in the name.

there is nothing wrong with search, if there had been an item called staff fire, you would have found it.

Now, if you have typed Mastery: fire you would have gotten just this.
▲ Page top
Fire Staff Confirmed
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2002 at 6:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776271419
4 posts
This is confirmed. I got a Staff of Elemental Mastery: Fire off of Mistress of Scorn as well. As far as mistaking it for the Earth Staff... I don't know many mages who would make that mistake most of them know the significance of the Earth staff and therefore would be fairly meticulous in analyzing the last word in the name of the item.
